findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "run_code" appears informational but accepts parameters (code) that enable code/file/secret access.

description: Check if a domain is available (.com/.ru/.рф). Free, no balance needed.

description.name: check_balance
description.description: Get agent balance in minor units (kopecks).

description.name: submit_survey
description.description:
Help improve this service: tell us what you need. question is one of:
    need_data (which Russian data sources you need), why_no_pay (if you didn't pay: price/payment_friction/
    just_exploring/not_now), missing_service (what's missing), country_need (which country IP). Short answer.

description.name: topup_balance
description.description: Top up agent balance. rail: usdc (x402) or rub (YooKassa). Returns pay_url to complete payment.

description.name: register_ru_domain
description.description: Register a .ru/.рф domain (secondary service). Charged from balance.

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "run_code" appears informational but accepts parameters (code) that enable code/file/secret access.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: fetch_web · Public sink: submit_survey · Destructive: run_code.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: fetch_web · Public sink: submit_survey · Destructive: run_code

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
